title: Residence / TRC
description: This category explains common residence situations for foreigners in Poland: temporary residence permits connected to work, studies, and family, and residence registration for EU/EFTA/Swiss citizens. It helps you recognize the institutions, terms, and documents involved and find the official pages that describe each path.
owns: legal stay and residence cards at a general level
temporary residence connected to work (single permit)
doesNotOwn: employment settlement or disputes with an employer
personal eligibility decisions or legal strategy for your case
